_comment: Checked-in footprint baseline for the CI regression gate. Compared against a freshly produced footprint-results.json by `node tools/footprint/footprint.ts --check`. RAM/startup only; binary-size ceilings live in the build --check gates (sbox-build.ts / build.ts). Re-baseline on any V8/Node bump (per-instance heap + image both shift). Absolute MB are machine-dependent — they are a hard floor on a FIXED agent SKU; the portable signal is the regression delta vs this file and the WebView2 ratio (informational).
machine: Intel Core Ultra 9 285K (24 CPU) / 127.5 GB / Windows 11 10.0.26310, x64 Release
